3035590.name: Woohoo! - Game "Math Path"
3035590.description:
Math Path is a game of tiles with numbers on them with math operators in between. The objective is to find the path from the starting tile to the finish tile where the answer to the paths math problem equals the number on the finish tile. The level is randomly generated when every time you start therefore you'll never play the same level twice.

When you buy and install this DLC, the mini-game will appear on the main menu as an option in the games list.
Click or touch the game in the games list to start a new level.

Touchscreen Support

Woohoo! - Game "Math Path" supports touchscreens. You can also use a stylus pen or your finger to select tiles.
(Touchscreen-enabled laptop or tablet required.)
